Pricing
🎉 Create a Board

Send warmth,
wish them well.

A cheerful team get-well board filled with warm wishes, encouraging messages, and healing thoughts — delivered to lift their spirits right when they need it most.

Create a Get-Well Board

Flat fee · $5 per board · Unlimited well-wishers · Yours forever

💚 Get Well Soon
"Sam, we're all rooting for you! Take all the rest you need — we've got things covered here. Your energy and positivity are missed every single day. Get well soon!"
JCY+16
19 teammates signed
😴Rest
💪Recovery
🌟Back Soon!
One board · One price$5

How it works

Four cheerful steps to lift someone's spirits and help them heal faster

Create Board

Start a cheerful get-well board and set up the recipient

1Dashboard

Gather Wishes

Collect warm get-well messages, fun GIFs and encouraging words from the team

2Collaborate

Wellness Gift

A printed get-well card with a curated wellness gift delivered to their door

3Keepsake

Share & Cheer

Send a private link or heartfelt email to lift their spirits instantly

4Reveal

Hover over each card to explore

Global Get-Well Map

Warm wishes and healing thoughts pour in from New York, London, Bangalore, Tokyo, and Amsterdam. The whole world is cheering for a speedy recovery!

“
A

Aarav Sharma

Team Lead📍 New Delhi, India
1 hour ago

“ Wishing you a smooth and speedy recovery. Take all the time you need to rest and focus on your health. We look forward to seeing you back, healthy and smiling. ”
